.github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: Go CI

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.23"
      - run: go test ./...
LICENSE:
# License

This project is initialized with the `MulanPSL-2.0` license.

The final repository should keep the complete license text that matches the selected open-source license.
README.md:
# Open Research Toolkit

A reproducible GitLink project initialized by an end-to-end automation workflow.

## 项目信息

- GitLink 仓库: `puygob236/gitlink-bootstrap-demo`
- 技术方向: Go
- 初始化来源: GitLink 项目一键初始化工作流

## 快速开始

```bash
git clone https://gitlink.org.cn/puygob236/gitlink-bootstrap-demo.git
cd gitlink-bootstrap-demo
```

## 协作约定

- 使用 Issue 跟踪需求、缺陷和文档任务。
- 使用 Pull Request 合并代码变更。
- 重要里程碑通过 Release Notes 记录。
docs/CONTRIBUTING.md:
# 贡献指南

请通过 Issue 讨论需求，通过 Pull Request 提交变更。
docs/ROADMAP.md:
